song_name: Olivia Rodrigo - Making The Bed - Vampire
version_description: There are a few lyric changes in the second verse to fit the rhythm/rhyme scheme of "Vampire.".
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Want it, so I got it, did it, so it's done[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]
Another thing I ruined, I used to do for fun[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
Another piece of plastic I could just throw away[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]
Another conversation with nothing good to say[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]
I thought it, so I said it, took it 'cause I can[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]
Another day pretendin' I'm older than I am[/tab]
[tab] [ch]D[/ch]
Another perfect moment that doesn't feel like mine[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]
Another thing I forced to be a sign[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]G[/ch]                                              [ch]C[/ch]
Well, sometimes I feel like I don't wanna be where I am[/tab]
[tab]                                             [ch]D[/ch]
Gettin' drunk at a club with my fair-weather friends[/tab]
[tab]                                         [ch]C[/ch]
Push away all the people who know me the best[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
But it's me who's been makin' the bed[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]C[/ch]
I'm so tired of bein' the girl that I am[/tab]
[tab]                                             [ch]D[/ch]
Every good thing has turned into somethin' I dread[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]C[/ch]
And I'm playin' the victim so well in my head[/tab]
[tab]                                  [ch]G[/ch]
But it's me who's been makin' the bed[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab]                         [ch]C[/ch]
Me who's been makin' the bed[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
Pull the sheets over my head, yeah[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
Makin' the bed[/tab]

(Sing [Verse 2] to the tune of "Vampire")

[Verse 2]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                                                [ch]B[/ch]
And every night, I wake up from this one reocurring dream[/tab]
[tab]                                                             [ch]C[/ch]
Where I'm drivin' through the city, and the brakes go out on me[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Cm[/ch]
I can't stop at the red light,   can't swerve off the road[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                                               [ch]B[/ch]
  I read somewhere it's only 'cause my life feels so out of control[/tab]
[tab]                                                             [ch]C[/ch]
And I tell someone I love them just so I can try and let him go,[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Cm[/ch]
They tell me that they love me    like I'm some kinda show[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
I made some real big mistakes, but you made the worst ones look fine[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]                                  [ch]B[/ch]
I should have known it was strange that you only come out at night[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]                                [ch]D[/ch]
I used to think I was smart, but you made me look so naive[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
The way you sold me for parts[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]B[/ch]
As you sunk your teeth into me - oh, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Cm[/ch]
Blood sucker, dream crusher[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab]                                   [ch]G[/ch]
But it's me whose been making the bed[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]
Me whose been making the bed[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Pull the sheets over my head[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Cm[/ch]
Making the bed - ooh[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
Making the bed[/tab]
